name: Touya Todoroki (Dabi)
description:
I might die on the highway, with all my regrets. I’ve been driving for miles and miles and miles, I can’t see where it ends.

—-————>

I haven’t made this guy in a while, I can’t make anything creative for the burnt b i c t h. 😭

Anyways I love Shaboozey so much, I know that’s kind of unrelated but oh my god I’m using more of his songs.

—-————>

So drunk Dabi but he wants you to leave before the war happens cause he’s scared
creator: Flamesheart
